data.title: BNB Surpasses 670 USDT with a 4.55% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 22, 2025, 17:51 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 670 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 675.72998 USDT, with a narrowed 4.55% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Robert Kiyosaki Says 'Everything Bubble' Will Cause Historic Market Crash, Bitcoin Will Be Fastest To Recover
data.description:
Investor and author Robert Kiyosaki, has predicted a “giant crash” in the market.

source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/cryptocurrency/25/02/43901226/robert-kiyosaki-says-everything-bubble-will-cause-historic-market-crash-bitcoin-will-be-fa?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: Security execs weigh in on ‘staggering’ scale of record Bybit hack
data.description:
The record-breaking $1.4 billion Bybit hack displays the “increasingly creative exploits” seen in the crypto industry, Halborn’s co-founder told Cointelegraph.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bybit-hack-security-execs-weigh-in?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Binance’s CZ buys 1 BNB of $TST, now working on adding it to liquidity pool
data.description:
Changpeng CZ Zhao just bought 1 BNB worth of $TST (approximately 5,400), and now he’s figuring out how to add it to a liquidity pool (LP). The former Binance CEO admitted via a post on X that the process wasn’t as easy as expected, even for someone who built the world’s largest crypto exchange. “DEX […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/binance-cz-buys-tst-adding-to-liquidity-pool/

data.title: Bybit launches $140 million recovery bounty program for stolen $1.5 billion
data.description:
Bybit is putting $140 million on the table for anyone who can help recover the $1.5 billion in stolen crypto from the biggest hack in history. The exchange, which is the second-largest by trading volume, announced that it will reward 10% of any funds recovered to cybersecurity experts, blockchain analysts, and ethical hackers who can […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bybit-launches-140-million-recovery-bounty/

data.title: mETH Protocol announces $43 million recovery from Bybit hack, while Tether freezes $181,000
data.description:
The recovery marks the most significant recovery from a Lazarus Group attack since $30 million was clawed back from the Ronin bridge hack.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/342840/meth-protocol-announces-43-million-recovery-from-bybit-hack-while-tether-freezes-181000?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: How to Prepare for Monad: The High-Speed EVM Layer-1 Blockchain
data.description:
A new layer-1 blockchain is set to rival Ethereum and Solana. Here’s how you can prepare for Monad ahead of the mainnet launch.

data.title: CZ responded to the purchase of TST: TST was purchased only for testing
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: When CZ responded to why he bought TST, he said that he bought TST only for testing.

data.title: CZ injects bilateral liquidity into TST/WBNB trading pair worth $200
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of Ai Yi, an analyst on the chain, 1 minute ago, CZ injected 1110.99 TEST and 0.096 WBNB bilateral liquidity into the TST/WBNB trading pair, worth about $200.
